Chronology of every recorded fact about [[D’Niss]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The D’Niss are titanic insects whose queen is currently under control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The D’Niss are described as bugs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The D’Niss are a target for extermination.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The D’Niss are associated with the Swarm-Queen Esh’kinaar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — A D’Niss is a creature capable of eating a planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — The D'Niss Swarm-Queen is not currently on the brink of returning.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 5''' — The D’Niss are a group whose return Raion intends to defend against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — The D’Niss was one of the groups Starhammer fought during his conquest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — The D’Niss are not currently pushing into the Captain's dimension.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Starhammer tore through a full-grown D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — The D’Niss could return at any time.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — The D’Niss are an alien incursion that has been increasing their activity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — The D'Niss are an enemy group that the Knights fought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — The D’Niss attacked three Iron Hives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — The war against the D’Niss was over years before the narrator's ritual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — The D’Niss are giant space monsters that the Knights defend against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — The D’Niss possess magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — The D'Niss are a group that could potentially be left to the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The D’Niss are described as straightforward villains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — The D’Niss are returning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — The D'Niss are a group of entities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Shyrax's ships resemble a swarm of D'Niss soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — The D’Niss are conducting an incursion on the edge of Dark Space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The Titan Knights were formed to fight the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The D’Niss is a group or entity with an unbroken shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — A blue lance of water sliced through the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — The D’Niss are an entity that requires a secure staging ground against them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Refugees from nearby worlds are fleeing the D’Niss advance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — The D’Niss feed on planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — The D’Niss are the enemies of the Titan Force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — The D’Niss are a group that the Karoshan fleets are targeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — The D’Niss exist to serve the Swarm-Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — The D’Niss are insectoid soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — D’Niss soldiers use psychic assault to soften up opponents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — The Perfected are capable of taking down a D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — D’Niss are capable of lurking in Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — The D'Niss are capable of channeling Aether at massive scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — A magical battle was occurring between the D’Niss and King Felrex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — The D’Niss are an enemy group gathering forces and armies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — The D’Niss are planning an incursion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — D’Niss are insects that burrow into every moon and planet in the Visiri system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — The D’Niss are located in a system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — The D’Niss are an ant-like entity with multiple heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — The D’Niss is a summoning spell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — The D’Niss are a group that Esh’kinaar belongs to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Esh’kinaar might be laying eggs of a future D’Niss into the star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Raion is fighting the last of the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The locust soldiers are tougher than standard D’Niss soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The D�Niss army is being fought by the Red Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The D’Niss were involved in a battle involving Esh’kinaar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — Millions of D’Niss soldiers have been killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The D’Niss are creatures that can be created via Esh’kinaar's spawn magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The D’Niss are capable of vanishing in a flurry of shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The D’Niss has wings and upper claws.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — The D’Niss are creatures that spawn smaller offspring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The D’Niss conducted an incursion on Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — The D’Niss are a group that is scattered, defeated, dead, or locked away from this universe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — A sword-strike on the level of the D’Niss can stretch between planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The D'Niss are rare and magically valuable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The D'Niss is a group that the Captain ruined a mech against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The D’Niss are described as giant bugs that can pop up again and come back stronger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Last Horizon has faced the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The D’Niss incursion devastated the Visiria system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The D’Niss are described as armies of locusts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Sola adapted psychic scanning from the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — The D’Niss caused losses to the Nova-Bots.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
